output.summary: Rebuild test page to use DemoContainer wrappers (matching TestimonialsCarousel pattern), add missing Loop and Loop+Autoplay variations, and add title to page. No padding code changes needed -- DynamicContentCarousel and TestimonialsCarousel already have identical padding implementations. No new accessibility tests needed -- carousel a11y pattern is already comprehensively covered.

designDecisions.question: Is DynamicContentCarousel padding different from TestimonialsCarousel?
designDecisions.recommendation: No changes needed. Both blocks use identical padding: section `py-10 sm:py-16`, container `py-10 md:py-15` with `before:-inset-y-8`. Total inner charcoal padding is 72px mobile / 92px desktop in both blocks. The dark-mode.md pattern document confirms this is the standard. The padding mismatch the user observed may be a visual perception issue caused by the test page lacking DemoContainer spacing between variations -- bare blocks stack directly against each other without separation, which can make padding look incorrect.

designDecisions.question: What test page design pattern should be followed?
designDecisions.recommendation: Use the DemoContainer wrapper pattern as implemented in TestimonialsCarousel test page (page ID 144). Each block variation wrapped in takt/demo-container with descriptive title and description. Current page (ID 136) has 10 bare takt/dynamic-content-carousel blocks with no wrappers. Also add 'TEST: ' prefix to page title and add missing Loop and Loop+Autoplay variations to match the TestimonialsCarousel test page coverage.

designDecisions.question: Are new accessibility tests needed?
designDecisions.recommendation: No new accessibility tests needed. The block report documents comprehensive WAI-ARIA carousel pattern compliance (CRSL-ARIA-001 through CRSL-ARIA-008, CRSL-KB-001/002, CRSL-BHV-001). Coverage includes: container role/aria-roledescription, slide roles/labels, navigation button accessible names, keyboard interaction, autoplay pause/play control, aria-live announcements, prefers-reduced-motion support. The existing taktician_a11y_test carousel pattern rules cover all standard checks. The block can be validated using `taktician_a11y_test` with patterns=['carousel'] against the test page.

testPageChanges.description: Complete rebuild of test page content to use DemoContainer wrappers (matching TestimonialsCarousel test page pattern). Page currently has 10 bare dynamic-content-carousel blocks without any DemoContainer wrappers, titles, or descriptions. Need to: (1) rename page title to 'TEST: Dynamic Content Carousel', (2) wrap each existing variation in takt/demo-container with descriptive title and description, (3) add two missing variations (Loop Mode and Loop+Autoplay) that TestimonialsCarousel has but DynamicContentCarousel does not.

accessibilityAnalysis.currentCoverage: Comprehensive WAI-ARIA carousel pattern coverage documented in block report. Includes: (1) Container ARIA: role=region, aria-roledescription=carousel, aria-labelledby/aria-label (A11Y-001). (2) Slide ARIA: role=group, aria-roledescription=slide, aria-label with position (A11Y-002). (3) Autoplay control: pause/play toggle with aria-label reflecting state (A11Y-003). (4) Dynamic announcements: aria-live region for slide changes (A11Y-004). (5) Motion preferences: prefers-reduced-motion support disabling autoplay and transitions (A11Y-005). (6) Pagination semantics: aria-hidden=true on decorative progress bar (A11Y-006). (7) Keyboard navigation: native button elements, Swiper A11y module, focus-visible outlines.
accessibilityAnalysis.reasoning: The block already implements the full WAI-ARIA carousel pattern. The existing carousel.json accessibility rules file covers all standard checks (CRSL-ARIA-001 through CRSL-ARIA-008 for static ARIA, CRSL-KB-001/002 for keyboard, CRSL-BHV-001 for behavioral). No additional accessibility patterns apply to this block type. The Loop+Autoplay variation being added to the test page will allow the existing carousel a11y tests to verify the autoplay pause/play toggle functionality. Running `taktician_a11y_test` with patterns=['carousel'] against the 'Loop + Autoplay' variation is recommended during QA to confirm autoplay accessibility controls work correctly.

paddingAnalysis.conclusion: All three sources (DynamicContentCarousel code, TestimonialsCarousel code, dark-mode.md pattern doc) use identical padding values. No code changes needed. The apparent padding mismatch may be due to the test page lacking DemoContainer wrappers, which add visual separation (py-8 sm:py-12 + border) between stacked variations. Without these wrappers, adjacent dark charcoal panels appear to visually merge, distorting padding perception.

output.qaDetails: After rebuilding the test page with DemoContainer wrappers, take screenshots at all breakpoints to verify: (1) DemoContainer titles and descriptions render correctly between block variations, (2) spacing between adjacent dark-mode blocks looks correct with DemoContainer separation, (3) new Loop and Loop+Autoplay variations render and function correctly. Run taktician_a11y_test with carousel pattern on the Loop+Autoplay instance.
